arts.ttl: Oday Dabbagh contract call as Aberdeen loanee sees parent club in transfer move to halt free agency
arts.sum: The Dons currently have the 26-year-old on-loan for the rest of the season

arts.ttl: James Wilson and fellow Scotland starlet pen new Hearts contracts
arts.sum: Jambos boss Critchley said: “It’s great news that both James and Adam have committed their futures to the club. Rising Scotland stars James Wilson and Adam Forrester have both signed new contracts with Hearts .

arts.ttl: Andrew McKinlay offers grovelling Hearts apology for top six failure as CEO's boast bites him in the backside
arts.sum: McKinlay had predicted that Hearts would still go onto challenge for a European qualification spot

arts.ttl: Neil Critchley points to his Hearts record in passionate defence as boss admits 'we'd be comfortably in the top six'
arts.sum: The Gorgie faithful hit out last weekend after missing out on a top half finish - but the boss has issued the numbers behind his reign

arts.ttl: Preview: Hearts vs. Aberdeen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Scottish Cup clash between Hearts and Aberdeen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
